mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 255 in the CPIAUCSL series signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite high CPI, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and payroll employment (PAYEMS) signals robust supply-side dynamics, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between INDPRO and PAYEMS shows negative coefficient in 20d return regressions (p > 0.05) or combined growth falls below 1.5% in 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by FEDFUNDS rising above 2.5%, create higher discount rates that depress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rate hikes, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 3.5% signals tight labor markets, increasing corporate pricing power and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite low unemployment, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) above 1150 thousand units signal strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising HOUST, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) above 109.5 index points indicates expanding manufacturing activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising INDPRO, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in retail sales (RSAFS) and GDP (GDPC1) indicates strong aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between RSAFS and GDPC1 shows negative coefficient in 20d return regressions (p > 0.05) or combined growth falls below 1.5% in 1 month.
